examples: Iris scanning can work from a distance.
Malware is scanning through the memory in real time and looking for data.
When people throw away food rubbish, they have to pay for it by scanning a barcode on the bin.
Iris-scanning cameras make sure you're the real, living thing by checking the pulse inside your eyeball.
Everywhere, it seemed, people were holding up their smartphones, scanning in items and comparing prices online.
